commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `TOOLS_SHARED.md` workspace bootstrap loading, routes it into Codex inherited developer instructions, permits the exact `<agent>/TOOLS_SHARED.md -> ../shared/TOOLS.md` symlink shape, and updates focused tests and prompt snapshots.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +153, Docs +1. Total +225 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this PR adds a new bootstrap capability, and the PR body provides after-fix live loader output plus focused source tests for the changed path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the missing public docs without changing the runtime implementation.

target.title: fix(agent): load shared tools bootstrap instructions
target.body:
## Summary
- Auto-load `TOOLS_SHARED.md` as an optional workspace bootstrap file.
- Route `TOOLS_SHARED.md` through Codex inherited developer instructions alongside `TOOLS.md`.
- Allow the intended workspace-local symlink shape: `<agent>/TOOLS_SHARED.md -> ../shared/TOOLS.md`, while rejecting other sibling targets.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Workspace bootstrap now loads a workspace-local `TOOLS_SHARED.md` entry so an agent can combine its own `TOOLS.md` with shared tool guidance.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout with a redacted agent workspace using the intended `TOOLS_SHARED.md -> ../shared/TOOLS.md` symlink shape. No channel credentials or provider API keys were used.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a local loader probe against the redacted workspace after applying this patch.
- Evidence after fix: Copied live command output with machine/user paths and file content redacted:

```json
{
  "workspaceDir": "<agent-workspace>",
  "link": "TOOLS_SHARED.md",
  "symlinkTarget": "../shared/TOOLS.md",
  "loaded": true,
  "loadedName": "TOOLS_SHARED.md",
  "loadedPath": "<agent-workspace>/TOOLS_SHARED.md",
  "contentPresent": true
}
```

- Observed result after fix: `loadWorkspaceBootstrapFiles()` returned `TOOLS_SHARED.md` as loaded from the workspace-local symlink path, with content present and without exposing the shared file content.
- What was not tested: No full live Codex model turn was sent; this proof covers the workspace bootstrap loader behavior changed by this PR.

## Tests
- `pnpm vitest run src/agents/workspace.test.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts test/scripts/prompt-snapshots.test.ts -- --runInBand`
- `pnpm vitest run src/agents/workspace.load-extra-bootstrap-files.test.ts src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.test.ts -- --runInBand`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm lint:core`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/agents/workspace.ts src/agents/workspace.test.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-context.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts test/helpers/agents/happy-path-prompt-snapshots.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/workspace.ts src/agents/workspace.test.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-context.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts test/helpers/agents/happy-path-prompt-snapshots.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: mantisai-bot
